name: WeChat Mini Program
requiredVerification: login and denied state review where relevant
platform permission review when permissions change
cloud function and access rule verification when touched
API error handling and degraded network review
release and rollback evidence when release behavior changes
releaseChecks: base library, privacy, permissions, cloud functions, and access rules reviewed when touched
release submission, rollback, and monitoring evidence captured for release-impacting changes
payment, value transfer, secrets, and production config require human approval

may: edit mini program pages, components, cloud functions, tests, and documentation inside approved task scope
propose platform permission, cloud function, and release changes with explicit evidence
mustNot: approve release submission, production config, payment, value transfer, secrets, or access rule expansion without human approval
handle production credentials or regulated data without human approval
